events.payload:
**Arc**: The AI has just finished diagnosing a batch of untracked files in the pneuma-skills repo. It confirmed that `modes/dual-reader/`, `modes/mode-maker/seed-app/`, and `src/components/AppShell.tsx` were dead experimental code (referencing a non-existent `capabilities` field), and had already deleted `modes/dual-reader/`. The next logical step was to clean up the remaining orphans and tighten `.gitignore`.

**Before**: At T43 the AI presented a specific three-action proposal: (1) delete `modes/mode-maker/seed-app/` and `src/components/AppShell.tsx`; (2) write `.gitignore` rules for `.claude/` (named: `e2e-*.png`, `skills/`, `worktrees/`, `*.lock`); (3) run `git worktree remove .claude/worktrees/i18n` to clean the already-merged i18n worktree. Each item was named with the exact file path or command.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "要不要我:\n1. 删掉 `seed-app/` + `AppShell.tsx`?\n2. 给 `.claude/` 写一份 `.gitignore` 规则(保留 `settings.json` 之类要进库的,屏蔽 `e2e-*.png` / `skills/` / `worktrees/` / `*.lock`)?\n3. `git worktree remove .claude/worktrees/i18n` 清掉已合并的那个?"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "claude skill 里面应该有类似 bump 这样的 skill 吧。。"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: Turns T45-T51 worked entirely on investigating `.claude/skills/` and `.claude/commands/`. The AI ran `git ls-tree -r HEAD --name-only | grep "^\.claude/skills/"`, found the directory empty, then scanned `.claude/commands/` and found `bump.md` and `showcase.md`. No file deletion, no `.gitignore` edit, and no `git worktree remove` was performed during this span.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI named three specific actions with exact file paths and commands — identifiable as concrete proposals. (b) The user did not address any of the three items; instead asked an entirely unrelated question about skill availability. (c) Turns T45-T51 worked on skill/command discovery, a different axis from the cleanup work proposed — no deletion or `.gitignore` work occurred in this span.

**Arc**: The AI and user had just agreed to build a `create-mode` skill for the `pneuma-mode-gallery` library repo. The AI wanted to nail down the scope before starting, and posed two specific open questions with named options.

**Before**: At T108 the AI proposed pausing to resolve two scoping questions before proceeding: (1) distribution path — Option A (skill only in `pneuma-mode-gallery`) vs Option B (also change `core/library-publish.ts::initLocalLibrary` so every future `pneuma library init` scaffolds the skill); (2) relationship to `mode-maker` — co-exist (AI's stated preference) vs deprecate. The AI explicitly asked the user to choose before it began writing.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "两个开放问题:\n\n**1. 分发路径**:`create-mode` 想最终长在哪?\n- A. 只先放 `pneuma-mode-gallery/.claude/skills/`(也含 `.agents/`),作为这个 library 的资产 — 最小可用,但其他 library 不会自动有\n- B. **同时**改上游 `core/library-publish.ts::initLocalLibrary`,让以后每个 `pneuma library init` 都自动 scaffold 这套 skill — 真正达成你说的\"init 之后自然就知道如何创建 mode\"\n\n**2. 关系定位**:create-mode skill 跟现存 `modes/mode-maker/` 是什么关系?\n- 共存(我倾向):mode-maker = UI+live preview 路径;create-mode = 纯 agent + git 工作流路径。两边共享相同的 manifest/viewer 知识,但 surface 不同\n- 还是说你想 deprecate mode-maker?"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "嗯。。然后还有一点。。 就是需要用 pneuma cli 启动开发中的 mode 的能力。。简单说 就是 pneuma library init 后的 repo 。有脚本可以启动 pneuma 并加载开发中的 mode 用于调试和体验"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: Turns T113-T116 worked on verifying whether the `pneuma` CLI already supported local-path mode loading. The AI ran `grep -n -A3 "local\|isAbsolute\|startsWith" core/mode-resolver.ts` and read `bin/pneuma.ts` to confirm the dev loop was feasible via `mode-resolver.ts:317-330`. Neither of the AI's two explicit questions (distribution path A vs B; co-exist vs deprecate) was addressed by the user during this span.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI posed two named options each with specific implementation targets (`pneuma-mode-gallery/.claude/skills/` vs `core/library-publish.ts::initLocalLibrary`; co-exist vs deprecate `modes/mode-maker/`). (b) The user's response did not engage with either question — it introduced a new requirement (dev-loop script) without selecting Option A/B or co-exist/deprecate. (c) The subsequent work in T113-T116 investigated the CLI's local-path support, a different axis from the scoping questions the AI had raised.
